Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers ensure they are using the latest code updates in their games.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a faster method to retrieve version information from the game's code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves game loading times by quickly accessing version data.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a faster method to handle string timestamps in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of displaying time-related information to players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagWeCanHaveFonts
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables the use of custom fonts in games.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to enhance the visual style of their games with unique text.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagWeCanHaveFonts_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Enables the use of new font types in the game.
Removed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to use a wider variety of fonts, enhancing the visual style of games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAllowPurchasesOutsideExperience_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows players to make purchases from the Roblox catalog even when not in a game.
Added_Other.purpose: Gives players more flexibility to buy items whenever they want, enhancing the shopping experience.
